title: Uaua Heat Wave
lead: Uaua is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.97. Temperatures are extremely high, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Uaua is causing extremely hot conditions, with a CDD of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 37%, and wind speed is at 12.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Uaua.
